rows.label: qev035103_MSG0001
rows.name:
...This is Zarch!
What's the situation? Did you find Odsent!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035103_MSG0002
rows.name:
...What!?
He was in a place like that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035103_MSG0003
rows.name:
Alright! I'll head there right away,
so just stall him for now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035103_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask how you should stall him.

rows.label: qev035103_MSG0004
rows.name:
You can't dominate a beast's mind
like the Bias do![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035103_MSG0005
rows.name:
Beat him up until he faints!
That'll make it easier for me to train him later.
...I'm counting on you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035103_MSG0006
rows.name:
You really are a reliable warrior!
Then, beat him up until he faints!
That'll make it easier for me to train him later![ST:wait ]
